title: China's Breakthrough in Rocket Recoveries

scenes.text: China just recovered a rocket successfully after its maiden flight!
This Long March 10B rocket marks a significant step in reusable rocket technology.
Reusable rockets can dramatically reduce costs and increase launch frequency.
This success could change the future of space exploration dramatically!
scenes.label: FUTURE OF SPACE

scenes.text: Follow for the science they never taught you.

description: China's successful recovery of the Long March 10B rocket paves the way for more affordable and frequent space launches. Follow for daily science!
